creator: taguchi@tohoku.iij.ad.jp
text:
Here is a X-TT update patch.

This patch does NOT update Xtt itselfs.
But update it for XFree86-3.3.6.

Many Thanks to Clive Lin.
Allmost of this patch is his work.
Thanks again.

And I've added patches which fix font chache corruption.
This is based H.J.Lu's patch for XFree86-4.0.

Fix: Please commit following patche to x11-servers/XttXF86srv-common:
and remove following files:
  XttXF86srv-common/patches/patch-ad, patch-b[a-g].
